---
title: "DS4420 Project: Predicting Gold Prices with Machine Learning Models"
authors: "Justin Wee & Andy Lin"
output: html_notebook
---

ARIMA(3,1,3) on Gold Price (USD)

```{r}
library(zoo)
library(ggplot2)
set.seed(42)

# Load and clean data
gold_raw <- read.csv("gold.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                     na.strings = "#N/A", check.names = FALSE)

# Strip BOM from first column name if present
colnames(gold_raw)[1] <- gsub("\xef\xbb\xbf|\\?", "", colnames(gold_raw)[1])
colnames(gold_raw)[1] <- "Date"

# Clean USD column: remove commas, convert to numeric
gold_raw$USD <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", gold_raw$USD))

# Parse dates and sort
gold_raw$Date <- as.Date(gold_raw$Date, format = "%m/%d/%y")
gold_raw <- gold_raw[order(gold_raw$Date), ]

# Drop rows with missing USD and filter to 2018 and later
gold_clean <- gold_raw[!is.na(gold_raw$USD), c("Date", "USD")]
gold_clean <- gold_clean[gold_clean$Date >= as.Date("2018-01-01"), ]

cat("Rows after cleaning:", nrow(gold_clean), "\n")
cat("Date range:", format(min(gold_clean$Date)), "to", format(max(gold_clean$Date)), "\n")

head(gold_clean)
```

```{r}
# Visualize the raw gold price data
ggplot(gold_clean, aes(x = Date, y = USD)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Gold Price (USD) Over Time") +
  xlab("Date") + ylab("Price (USD/oz)") 
```

```{r}
# Create lag features (up to lag 8)
gold_lags <- gold_clean
for (i in 1:8) {
  gold_lags[, paste0("Lag_", i)] <- c(rep(NA, i), head(gold_lags$USD, -i))
}

# Drop rows with NAs introduced by lagging
gold_lags <- na.omit(gold_lags)

# ACF on the USD series to analyze autocorrelation structure
acf(gold_lags$USD, main = "Gold Price (USD) ACF Plot")
```

```{r}
# Train/Test Split (80/20)
train_size <- round(0.8 * nrow(gold_lags))
train_data <- gold_lags[1:train_size, ]
test_data <- gold_lags[(train_size + 1):nrow(gold_lags), ]

y_train <- train_data$USD
y_test <- test_data$USD

cat("Training size:", nrow(train_data), "\n")
cat("Test size:", nrow(test_data), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Manual Differencing (d = 1)
difference <- function(x, d = 1) {
  for (i in seq_len(d)) x <- diff(x)
  return(x)
}

train_diff <- difference(y_train, d = 1)

# ACF on differenced series to justify p and q choices
acf(train_diff, lag.max = 20, main = "ACF of Differenced Gold Price (USD)")
```

```{r}
# Manual ARIMA(3,1,3) via Gradient Descent
fit_arima_manual <- function(x_diff, p = 3, q = 3, n_iter = 500, lr = 1e-6) {
  n <- length(x_diff)
  start <- max(p, q) + 1
  y <- x_diff[start:n]
  N <- length(y)

  # Initialize coefficients
  phi <- rep(0.01, p) 
  theta <- rep(0.01, q) 
  mu <- mean(y)

  errors <- rep(0, n) 

  for (iter in 1:n_iter) {
    resid <- numeric(N)

    for (t in 1:N) {
      t_orig <- t + start - 1

      ar_idx <- (t_orig - 1):(t_orig - p)
      ma_idx <- (t_orig - 1):(t_orig - q)

      ar_part <- sum(phi * x_diff[ar_idx])
      ma_part <- sum(theta * errors[ma_idx])

      fitted <- mu + ar_part + ma_part
      resid[t] <- y[t] - fitted
      errors[t_orig] <- resid[t]
    }

    # Gradients (MSE loss)
    grad_mu <- -2 * mean(resid)

    grad_phi <- numeric(p)
    for (j in 1:p) {
      lag_vals <- x_diff[(start - j):(n - j)]
      grad_phi[j] <- -2 * mean(resid * lag_vals)
    }

    grad_theta <- numeric(q)
    for (j in 1:q) {
      err_vals <- errors[(start - j):(n - j)]
      grad_theta[j] <- -2 * mean(resid * err_vals)
    }

    # Gradient descent update
    mu <- mu - lr * grad_mu
    phi <- phi - lr * grad_phi
    theta <- theta - lr * grad_theta

    if (iter %% 100 == 0) {
      cat(sprintf("Iter %d | MSE: %.4f\n", iter, mean(resid^2)))
    }
  }

  list(phi = phi, theta = theta, mu = mu,
       residuals = resid, errors = errors)
}

cat("\nFitting manual ARIMA(3,1,3)...\n")
fit <- fit_arima_manual(train_diff, p = 3, q = 3, n_iter = 500, lr = 1e-6)

cat("\nEstimated AR coefficients (phi):\n"); print(round(fit$phi, 4))
cat("Estimated MA coefficients (theta):\n"); print(round(fit$theta, 4))
cat("Estimated intercept (mu):\n"); print(round(fit$mu, 4))
```

```{r}
# Stationarity Check - AR root moduli should all be > 1
ar_roots <- polyroot(c(1, -fit$phi))
cat("\nAR Root Moduli (should all be > 1 for stationarity):\n")
print(round(Mod(ar_roots), 4))
```

```{r}
# Forecast
forecast_arima <- function(x_orig, fit, p = 3, q = 3, h) {
  x_diff <- difference(x_orig, d = 1)
  n <- length(x_diff)
  past_errors <- fit$errors

  extended <- c(x_diff, rep(NA, h))
  extended_errors <- c(past_errors, rep(0, h))

  for (i in 1:h) {
    t <- n + i
    ar_idx <- (t - 1):(t - p)
    ma_idx <- (t - 1):(t - q)

    ar_part <- sum(fit$phi * extended[ar_idx])
    ma_part <- sum(fit$theta * extended_errors[ma_idx])
    extended[t] <- fit$mu + ar_part + ma_part
  }

  # Invert differencing to return to original scale
  last_val <- tail(x_orig, 1)
  diff_fcst <- tail(extended, h)
  cumsum(c(last_val, diff_fcst))[-1]
}

h_steps <- nrow(test_data)
forecasts <- forecast_arima(y_train, fit, p = 3, q = 3, h = h_steps)
```

```{r}
# Evaluation
mae <- mean(abs(forecasts - y_test))
rmse <- sqrt(mean((forecasts - y_test)^2))
mape <- mean(abs((forecasts - y_test) / y_test)) * 100

cat(sprintf("Forecast Evaluation (last %d months):\n", h_steps))
cat(sprintf("MAE:  %.2f\n", mae))
cat(sprintf("RMSE: %.2f\n", rmse))
cat(sprintf("MAPE: %.2f%%\n", mape))
```

```{r}
# Residual Diagnostics
resid <- fit$residuals

# Residuals over time
plot(resid, type = "l",
     main = "Residuals Over Time",
     ylab = "Residuals", xlab = "Index")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2)

# Histogram with density curve
hist(resid, breaks = 20, probability = TRUE,
     main = "Histogram of Residuals",
     xlab = "Residuals", col = "gray")
lines(density(resid), col = "blue", lwd = 2)

# Q-Q plot
qqnorm(resid, main = "Q-Q Plot of Residuals")
qqline(resid, col = "red", lwd = 2)

# ACF of residuals - check for remaining autocorrelation
acf(resid, lag.max = 20, main = "ACF of Residuals")
```

```{r}
# Observed vs predicted scatterplot
plot(forecasts, y_test,
     xlab = "Predicted USD", ylab = "Observed USD",
     main = "ARIMA(3,1,3) Forecast vs Actual")
abline(0, 1, col = "red")

# Time series plot of actual vs forecast
plot(test_data$Date, y_test, type = "l", col = "black", lwd = 2,
     ylim = range(c(forecasts, y_test)),
     xlab = "Date", ylab = "Gold Price (USD/oz)",
     main = "ARIMA(3,1,3) Forecast vs Actual")
lines(test_data$Date, forecasts, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("Actual", "Forecast"),
       col = c("black", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), bty = "n")
```

```{r}
# Full series ggplot with training, actual, and forecast
plot_df <- data.frame(
  Date = c(train_data$Date, test_data$Date, test_data$Date),
  Value = c(y_train, y_test, forecasts),
  Type = c(rep("Training", nrow(train_data)),
           rep("Actual", nrow(test_data)),
           rep("Forecast", nrow(test_data)))
)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Date, y = Value, color = Type, linetype = Type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Training" = "blue",
    "Actual" = "black",
    "Forecast" = "red"
  )) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    "Training" = "solid",
    "Actual" = "solid",
    "Forecast" = "solid"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Manual ARIMA(3,1,3) - Gold Price (USD)",
    subtitle = sprintf("RMSE: %.2f | MAE: %.2f | MAPE: %.2f%%", rmse, mae, mape),
    x = "Date",
    y = "Gold Price (USD/oz)",
    color = NULL,
    linetype = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p)
ggsave("arima_gold_forecast.png", p, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 150)
```
